pi_items.source: FITS header TELESCOP='ESO-VLT-U1' and download URL from esahubble.org
FITS header HIERARCH ESO OBS TARG NAME='NGC6218-Q1'
FITS header HIERARCH ESO INS OPTI7 NAME='V_BESS'
task description and setup_task.sh ROI configuration script
task.json instructions mapped to the home directory of the environment user 'ga'

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real astronomical imaging data from the ESO Very Large Telescope (VLT), targeting the globular cluster Messier 12 (NGC 6218) using a V-band filter. The Region of Interest (ROI) size for the corner illumination check is confirmed to be 200x200 pixels. The final report must be saved to /home/ga/AstroImages/uniformity_check/uniformity_report.txt.
